extDesc.message: Blocks network requests to URLs matching your filters. Supports domains and wildcard patterns.

patternHelp.message: Entering a domain (example.com) blocks it and all subdomains. Wildcard URL patterns (*ads*, https://foo.com/tracker*) are also supported.

editorHelp.message: One pattern per line. Prefix a line with # to disable that filter. Changes apply on Save (Ctrl/Cmd+S).
